ul.li: Direct pipeline: H2D → Compute → D2H
Fixed input size: Must provide complete frames
Lower latency: 86.79 µs
Lower memory: 164 KB
Use case: Offline batch processing, file analysis
Ring buffer accumulation: Flexible chunk sizes
Frame extraction: Overlapping frame extraction on demand
Higher latency: 122.25 µs (+40%)
Higher memory: 295 KB (+80%)
Use case: Real-time streaming, continuous monitoring

div.p: Both modes use the same 3-stream asynchronous pipeline for parallel H2D/Compute/D2H.

div.h1: Ionosense HPC D2 Diagram Color Scheme

ul.li: Core Blue (#E6F3FF / #4169E1): Core platform, executors, C++ architecture
Execution Red (#FFE6E6 / #C00000): Execution layer, workflow phases
Streaming Green (#E6FFE6 / #228B22): Streaming components, analysis
Benchmark Orange (#FFF5E6 / #FF8C00): Benchmarks, artifacts, results
Config Blue (#F0F8FF / #4169E1): Configuration, orchestration
Note Gold (#FFFACD / #FFD700): Notes, capabilities, highlights
Research Green (#E8F5E9 / #4CAF50): Research applications, impact
GPU Gold (#FFD700 / #B8860B): Device memory, GPU resources
Host Green (#90EE90 / #228B22): Pinned host memory
Ring Buffer (#C4E6C4 / #228B22): Per-channel ring buffers
PCIe Red (#FFE4E4 / #C00000): Host-device transfers
Kernel Orange (#FFE4B5 / #FF8C00): CUDA kernels, C++ extension
CUDA Resource (#D4E6FF / #4169E1): CUDA resource management
Exception Pink (#FFB6C1 / #FF6B6B): Exception handling
Use core-blue for primary architectural components
Use execution-red for workflow/execution phases
Use streaming-green for continuous/streaming data flows
Use benchmark-orange for performance measurement components
Use note-gold for informational callouts and highlights
Use gpu-memory for all device memory allocations
Use host-memory for page-locked host buffers
Use pcie-transfer for explicit H2D/D2H transfer nodes
dependency: Dashed line (stroke-dash: 3) for loose coupling
ownership: Diamond arrowhead for composition/ownership
implementation: Dashed + triangle for interface implementation
data-flow: Solid line with standard arrow for data movement
text-note: Italic, small font, no border (metadata)
section-header: Bold, medium font, no border (section titles)
text-label: Standard text, no border (inline labels)
Input shape: [channels, num_samples]
Output shape: [channels, num_frames, num_bins]
Mean latency: 86.79 µs
Ideal for high-throughput batch processing

div.p: Process input for all channels Extract overlapping frames
Performance: Mean latency 86.79 µs Direct pipeline = minimal overhead Ideal for high-throughput batch processing
